moments.title: Wimbledon Begins
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships will start on June 29, 2026, and run for two weeks at SW19.

angles.name: Grass-Court Tennis
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis as Wimbledon begins on June 29

angles.name: Tennis Frenzy
angles.copy: Who will be crowned the champion of the 2026 Wimbledon Championships?

angles.name: London Summer
angles.copy: Summer in London is not complete without Wimbledon, starting June 29

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix will take place at Silverstone on July 5, 2026, as round 12 of the 2026 F1 season.

angles.name: F1 Action
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just around the corner, get ready for high-speed action at Silverstone on July 5

angles.name: Racing Legends
angles.copy: Who will take the top spot on the podium at the 2026 British Grand Prix?

angles.name: Silverstone Summer
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is a highlight of the summer racing calendar, taking place on July 5

moments.title: Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: The summer solstice typically falls on June 20 or 21, but the summer season is in full swing

angles.name: Summer Vibes

angles.name: Outdoor Fun
angles.copy: Get outdoors and enjoy the best of the British summer, from parks to beaches

angles.name: Seasonal Delights

moments.title: Paul McCartney's Birthday
moments.blurb: Paul McCartney, legendary musician and former member of The Beatles, would have been 84 on June 18, but his music lives on

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Paul McCartney's incredible career has spanned decades, from The Beatles to solo success

angles.name: Musical Icon
angles.copy: Celebrate the enduring music of Paul McCartney, a true icon in the world of rock and pop

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Paul McCartney's songs continue to inspire and entertain, a testament to his timeless talent

moments.title: Midsummer
moments.blurb: The midsummer season is a time for celebration and outdoor activities

angles.name: Summer Nights
angles.copy: Make the most of the long summer nights and enjoy the magic of midsummer

angles.name: Outdoor Adventures
angles.copy: Get outdoors and experience the best of the British summer, from hiking to festivals
